mapper.insert: { call dwt.spdwt_payment_add( #{ptransactionid, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pbankgateway, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ptranref, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pclientcode, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pclientname, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcashamt, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pfptsacc, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pbankcode, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pbranch, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pdescription, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pstatus, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pdomestic, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pcostcenter, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pchannel, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ptransdate, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{pcreatedate, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{pcreateby, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{papproveby, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plongname, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pstatusacc, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ppartition, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{poffset, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{prequestid, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pbankpartition, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pbankoffset, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pimportnova, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pcot, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{preturncode, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{preturnMess, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
